sales.title: Calabria, Tarentum. Didrachm

Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 45162 — CARIA. Satrap Pixodaros. AR Didrachm (6.96 gms), Halikarnassos Mint, ca. 341/0-336/5 B.C. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 3/5. Brushed.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  h
sales.description:
CARIA. Satrap Pixodaros. AR Didrachm (6.96 gms), Halikarnassos Mint, ca. 341/0-336/5 B.C. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 3/5. Brushed.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
HN Online-241; Konuk-30. Obverse: Laureate head of Apollo facing slightly right, drapery around neck; Reverse: Zeus Labraundos standing right.

From the Peter Jones M.D. Collection.

Ex: Classical Numismatic Group Auction 127 (9/2024), Lot # 235 (with ticket).

Estimate: 300 - 500...

sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 430 — Italy. Campana, Neapolis. 4th-3rd Centuries BC. Silver Didrachm (7.68g) 20mm. Head of Nymph r. wearing broad diadem, earring and necklace, dolphins around wavy hair. Reverse: Man-headed bull (off flan
sales.description:
Italy. Campana, Neapolis. 4th-3rd Centuries BC. Silver Didrachm (7.68g) 20mm. Head of Nymph r. wearing broad diadem, earring and necklace, dolphins around wavy hair. Reverse: Man-headed bull (off flan) stg. r. hd. facing, crowned by Nike flying r. S-299; BMC 1, 27. NGC graded Choice Very Fine; Strike: 3/5, Surface: 4/5 Fine Style Lightly toned.  Estimated Value $400 - UP
Ex Peter Preovolos Collection....

sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 492 — Satraps of Caria. Pixodarus, ca. 341-336/5 BC. Silver Didrachm (6.93g), 18 mm. Flowing hair of Apollo 3/4 facing r. with floral border. Reverse:  Zeus Labraundos st. r. lwith axe and sceptre. Lightly
sales.description:
Satraps of Caria. Pixodarus, ca. 341-336/5 BC. Silver Didrachm (6.93g), 18 mm. Flowing hair of Apollo 3/4 facing r. with floral border. Reverse:  Zeus Labraundos st. r. lwith axe and sceptre. Lightly toned. NGC Choice VF; Strike: 5/5; Surface: 4/5.   Estimated Value $400 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....
